steps.action: Acknowledge toggle mutation on workspace video (Mark as read/unread) with controlled pre/post cache probes
steps.expected: Mutation endpoint and related channel snapshot cache are invalidated; unrelated cached reads remain cached
steps.observed: Observed PUT /api/videos/QwShVo0zfuk/acknowledged and refreshed GET /api/channels/UCbRP3c757lWg9M-U7TyEkXA/snapshot?limit=20&offset=0&video_type=all after re-read; no GET /api/channels and no GET for unrelated channel snapshot key

steps.action: Transcript ensure mutation by selecting a different video while transcript mode is active, then controlled re-reads
steps.expected: Transcript ensure invalidates transcript and related snapshot caches while leaving unrelated cached reads intact
steps.observed: Observed POST /api/videos/nsqGI1VAYbU/transcript/ensure, GET /api/videos/nsqGI1VAYbU/transcript, and snapshot refresh GETs on re-read; no GET /api/channels in the controlled probe

steps.action: Highlight delete mutation (UI remove + controlled delete probe) with post-mutation re-reads
steps.expected: Only highlight caches are invalidated/refreshed; unrelated endpoints remain cached
steps.observed: Observed DELETE /api/highlights/{id}, followed by GET /api/highlights and GET /api/videos/QwShVo0zfuk/highlights on re-read; no GET /api/channels and no GET /api/videos/nsqGI1VAYbU/transcript in controlled probe

frictions.description: agent-browser network log reports duplicate entries per request (fetch/other), so endpoint presence/absence was used as the stable signal rather than raw counts.
frictions.resolution: Used controlled warm-cache -> mutate -> post-read flows and evaluated endpoint set differences.

frictions.description: The /highlights route initially showed zero highlights due previously cached empty highlight data in session state during setup.
frictions.resolution: Created test highlights via in-browser API module and validated deletion from workspace highlight controls plus controlled delete probe.

summary: VAL-DATA-005 passed. Across acknowledge toggle, transcript ensure, and highlight delete mutations, related caches were refreshed while controlled unrelated cached reads (e.g., /api/channels, unrelated transcript key) were not re-requested.
